🔧 Fix All Numeric Values in Database
Re-parses all Value, Freight, VAT, and Total Value fields across all 0 records. Fixes European number formatting issues (e.g. 12.334 → 12,334).

📋 Bulk Paste Shipments

Copy rows directly from your Excel file and paste below. Use the exact same format as your original shipment file. Include or exclude the header row — both work.

Expected columns (35): Invoice Date | Location | Invoice No. | Shipping Mode | Tracking no. | SKU | Total Pcs/Qty. | Value | Freight/Insurance | VAT by Vendor | 3rd Party Freight | Total Value | Carrier Duty | Carrier Freight | VAT | ERP Posted Date | Status | ETA and Delivery Date | GRN NO. | GIN NO. | PO No. | Category | BOX/Ctn | Remark | Final Status | Vendor | Financial Year | Prod Info Sheet | Remarks | POA/German Translation | Actual ETA | ETA Given by Supplier | Container | Agent Name | Payment Status

📤 Excel Upload — Smart Diff Review

Upload your updated Excel file. Only new shipments and ETA changes (last 30 days) will be detected. Review before importing.
